title: taraxacum elongatum
intro: Taraxacum elongatum, also known as the elongated dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain taraxasterol, a triterpene saponin with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum elongatum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum elongatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
